title: Intense Spicy Slovakian Pork Stew
description: A spicy and flavorful stew featuring pork, cilantro, and render fat, perfect for a lazy Sunday, this dish is also ayurvedic tamasic friendly.
instructions: Heat the render fat in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the pork cubes and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it starts to soften, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Stir in the paprika, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chopped cilantro and cook for 1 minute, until it starts to wilt.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours, or until the pork is tender.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
